important_note: This is an interpretive representation, NOT a runtime execution engine or enforcement DAG. All dependencies are analytical interpretations grounded in empirical severity data.

layers.name: Foundation Layer (System Reliability)
layers.dependency_annotation: All features in all other layers carry DEPENDENCY_RISK_FLAGGED if this layer is not stable.

layers.name: Structural Content Layer (Curriculum Alignment)
layers.dependency_annotation: Personalization and cognitive adaptation are DEPENDENCY_RISK_FLAGGED without correct curriculum structure.

layers.name: Access & Equity Layer
layers.dependency_annotation: Access features require system stability but are independent of curriculum alignment.

layers.name: Cognitive Personalization Layer
layers.dependency_annotation: High-frequency but mixed-sentiment signal — target at-risk learner minority, not majority.

layers.name: Experience Enhancement Layer
layers.dependency_annotation: Engagement and AI support are downstream optimizations. Empirically correct to implement after stability + curriculum.
